feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Multiple Quality Bins - One for Recieving and one for production
entry.content:
Business wants to have two Quality Bin locations and tied to two different process

1. On GR from supplier to Quality Bin location QUA-1

2. On GR from Production to Wuality Bin Location QUA-2

After either inpsection is completed standard putway is applied to move to WH storage

entry.title: Packaging Specification is not determined after Inbound Delivery is distributed to EWM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to do an automatic packing for an inbound delivery. However, no HU is created automatically even though I have provided correct details in the Determination tab in transaction SCWM/PACKSPEC (See below screenshots)

Packaging Specification

Condition Type: 0IBD

Level Set: ZPALLET

HU Creation: Ticked

 

Inbound Delivery

HEADER

GR Office: SCU-9902

 

ITEM

Product: 100006

 

Ship-From: Z000000034

 

Next are my configuration for the Packaging Specification Determination

1. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Maintain Structure of Packaging Specification > Define Level Sets 

 

2. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Access Sequence

Access Seq.: 0IBD

 

3. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Condition Type

Condition Type: 0IBD

Access Seq.: 0IBD

4. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Determination Procedure

Procedure: 0IBD

Condition Type: 0IBD

5. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > GR Process > Inbound Delivery > Define Document Type for Inbound Deliveries Process

Document Type: INB

Doc. Category: PDI

Additionally, I tried to pack in Inbound Delivery > Follow-up Function > Pack --- and then by clicking the "Pack Automatically" icon, my material is packed based on what I have maintained in the packaging specification.

What I am expecting is, HUs will be created automatically once Inbound Delivery is distributed to EWM and not by clicking manually  the "Pack Automatically" Icon

Q: Any idea what do I miss?

 

Thanks,

Vince

entry.title: remove/hide partially delivered & TECOed purchase order from VL10B display list
entry.content:
Hello

 

1- How can i remove or hide a TECOed & partially delivered purchase order from VL10B display list ?

2- How can i change delivery note print order, i.e. want to display bin order

 

Thanks

Nabeel

entry.title: Floor level Picking
entry.content:
What could be donewithout creating new storage type (if possible) to have EWM picking pick from the floor level bins.

Would storage sectioning be the best way to achieve is by create storage section FLOOR and then assigning floor level bins to the storage section. Then in material master have stock removal rule set to storage section FLOOR

Is the way I have it oulined the best way to achieve this?

Putaway would stay the same for inboud task. mixed storage (add to existing or empty)

entry.title: ABAP class / FM or BAPI to create Inbound Delivery Directly in SAP EWM
entry.content:
I'm trying to create inbound deliveries directly in our decentralized SAP EWM system without a connected SAP ERP. I've already referred to the following threads on the forum, but they haven't provided a solution:

  • How to create Inbound Delivery through FM/BAPI just in the EWM system?
  • Creation of Inbound delivery in EWM - SAP Community

So far, I have found that FM: /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA which internally uses ABAP Class: "/scwm/cl_mapin_id_savereplica" (this same class is used in idoc which would create inbound delivery) to create delivery in EWM. However, if I try to use this class or FM directly in my ABAP report, it throws an exception "/SCWM/CX_TM_USAGE". The ST22 error long text says, "PROG/ Z_TEST_CREATE_IBDLV is not an external interface; contact administrator". On investigating further, I found out that this class would validate a few things like checking if the program type is RFC or IDoc. If it is a regular ABAP program of type "PROG" it will raise this exception.

My specific requirement is to create inbound deliveries programmatically or via a batch job based on external data stored in our custom tables. The requirement is also to create the inbound deliveries from the RF transactions.

I'm wondering if there are any standard ABAP classes, Function Modules (FM), or BAPIs available in SAP EWM that can be used to achieve this.

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: How can i adjust the HU_LABEL in the public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

how can i adjust the HU_LABEL in the public cloud? And use/print a version e.g. without sled and/or Material Info. Just the Barcode.

 

br, Patrick

entry.title: SAP EWM Error message /SCWM/UI_RF021
entry.content:
Hello everybody.

I am getting the following message everytime I try to confirm a warehouse task on RFUI but only with this SKU

Picking and Putaway get the same message
I suspect that it could be something related to the conversion Unit. Maybe someone modified MM02 or MAT1 of this material and messed something up. All my conversion units are in Spanish, not english.

entry.title: Cancel Delivery Request - Stuck Queue on EWM side, delivery not created and no longer needed
entry.content:
ERP delivery is distributed to EWM, but getting stuck in queue due to missing customizing. Related errors:

  • Could not create header data delivery &1, system &2 (/SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION012)
  • No document type found for delivery type &1 from system &2 (/SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION002) 

The delivery is no longer needed, need to be cancelled / rejected.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Converting Excel File for SAP Upload: automate EWM packaging specification and stock upload in SAP
entry.content:
In the context of SAP master data migration, I developed a VBA-based tool designed to automate the process of converting any Excel file into the correct format for SAP uploads. This tool is currently used for two key use cases: stock migration and packaging specification migration.

Use Case Example: Stock Migration

Consider the scenario where we receive an Excel file containing a customer’s stock data that needs to be migrated into SAP. Unfortunately, we can’t directly upload this file into SAP due to format incompatibility. Without automation, this would involve a time-consuming process of manually copying and pasting each row into the appropriate template.

The Solution: Automating the Process

With my tool, this manual work is eliminated. By simply pressing the “Start Migration” button, the VBA code automatically converts the input file into the correct format required for SAP upload, significantly reducing both time and potential errors.

Below, you can find a summary (non-exhaustive)



Benefits of the Tool

 

  • Automation: No more manual copy-pasting; the tool automates the entire conversion process.
  • Efficiency: The migration process is completed in seconds, not hours.
  • Flexibility: While currently focused on stock and packaging specifications, the tool can be adapted for other data migration needs.

If you’d like to discuss how this tool could help streamline your data migration processes, feel free to reach out. There are no limitations, only solutions! 😉

  EWM - Master Data 

📧h.evrard@cnt-online.com 📱 +32 473 60 82 70 🔗 LinkedIn: Hugo Evrard

entry.title: Create Nested Handling unit during Picking in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have an Handling unit (HU1) which consists of 10 boxes. Requirement is to pick only 1 box. So warehouse user will pick 1 box and new handling unit needs to be created for that 1 box. That box has to be kept in trolley (Pick HU)

Hence , we need to create 2 new HU's in total during picking. 1 for box and another one for Pick HU.

How can we do this on RF device during Picking in SAP EWM?

Thanks,

Onkar

entry.title: Split valuation is not getting updated in EWM table /SCWM/T_VAL_SPLT
entry.content:
Hello,

We have products which are split valuated but non batch managed products.

We are running tcode /SCWM/VALUATION_SET in EWM but table  /SCWM/T_VAL_SPLT is not getting updated. 

Any reason for this or I am missing something?

Thanks,

Onkar

entry.title: S/4HANA TM & EWM Embedded - Configuration Guide
entry.content:
We are implementing S/4 HANA 2023 FPS 01 version where we have SAP Transportation Management and SAP Extended Warehouse Management modules are embedded. Please share configuration URL so that we can start configuration for both modules.

entry.title: Business Process Master List (BPML) for SAP EWM project
entry.content: Hi, I am looking for a Business Process Master List (BPML) template for SAP EWM project. Is there anyone in the group who has such kind of document? Thanks.

entry.title: SAP EWM Bonded Warehouse Outbound Process (Differentiation of stock types)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Greetings of the day

We are in process of finalizing bonded warehouse solution for our client.

Below is the requirement from business for "Outbound process", Kindly help me to understand this scenario better, which helps me to map the system settings in right direction.

  1. Warehouse 1234 is currently managed in EWM, the same warehouse 1234 they want to use as BWH, which means the warehouse has both Bonded and Non-Bonded stocks.
  2. With in Bonded warehouse they have “Free circulation” stocks and “Duty unpaid” stocks.
  3. Non bonded stocks will be with stock type F2 and bonded stocks will be with stock type C2. I am not sure if free circulation stocks will be F2 and will be separated based on partner/party entitled to dispose
  4. In ECC the storage location is only one for both Bonded and Non Bonded is 2002

Question:

When we process customer order and creates the delivery, the storage location will be 2002 for all, when the delivery gets dropped to EWM system, how system understands whether…

  1. If it is Non Bonded stocks the stock type should be F2
  2. If it is Bonded and duty unpaid, the stock type should be C2
  3. If it is Free circulation stock, the stock type should be F2

When the delivery is in EWM, system determines the stock type already, my understanding is stock type determination is crucial here.

I have never implemented BWH solution before, I have very limited knowledge, based on our internal discussions I am trying to understand and making settings.

Kindly help me with the system settings, if we need to make any specific settings in ECC/S4 or in EWM to address the above requirements.

Thanks,

Hari.

 

SAP Community  SAP Extended Warehouse Management  SAP Global Trade Services

entry.title: TO creation from TR without Split
entry.content:
Hello,

Tring to find a solution to stop the spliting while creating TO if the threshold of qty fullfilled.

Regards.

entry.title: Same product with mixed batch to be stored in Addition to Existing stock/Next Empty Bin
entry.content:
While Doing the Configuration for Putaway rule "2" with Mixed storage on product Level is not Working .

Where on the Basis of Capacity check the Stock first should be Placed in the bin where Storage is available as per capacity else will be stored in Next empty Bin.
While Following the Configuration suggested in the SAP Note 2409948 Mixed storage of different batches in same bin not working, Getting the Error Mixed storage in HU only with mixed storage in bin (Message No. /SCWM/LT275).

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud confirm WarehouseTask S210 Picking into HU
entry.content:
Hi this confirm ends with error when calling API: Changing the target data is allowed only with an exception response code
But for change DestinationHandlingUnit has no field for exception code.

POST <host>/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_warehouse_order_task_2/srvd_a2x/sap/warehouseorder/0001/WarehouseTask(EWMWarehouse='1050',WarehouseTask='1000022706',WarehouseTaskItem='0')/SAP__self.ConfirmWarehouseTaskProductX-CSRF-Token: kF1uaxWzKBzvw8_6BXafug==
If-Match: W/"SADL-020221208064522C~20221208064522"
{
    "AlternativeUnit": "PC",
    "ActualQuantityInAltvUnit" : 1,
    "DifferenceQuantityInAltvUnit": 0,
    "WhseTaskExceptionCodeQtyDiff": "",
    "DestinationStorageBin": "",
    "WhseTaskExCodeDestStorageBin": "",
    "SourceHandlingUnit": "",
    "DestinationHandlingUnit": "HU123456987",
    "DestinationResource": ""
}
How this works?
How to confirm WT without use of exception code?
The standard RF works without exception code.....
Thank you

entry.title: Re: ABAP class/FM/BAPI/IDOC to create/maintain Inbound De...
entry.content:
I have come across a solution to create an Inbound delivery in EWM using an ABAP program. Debugging the standard T-code "/SCWM/PRDI" felt overly complex, so I shifted to creating the inbound delivery using IDoc test transaction WE19 (IDoc type: SHP_IBDLV_SAVE_REPLICA). The delivery was successfully created through the IDoc, which led me to debug the IDoc function module "/SCWM/IDOC_INPUT_IBDLV_SAVEREP".

During this process, I identified a class "/scwm/cl_mapin_id_savereplica". This class is used in the IDoc function module for inbound delivery creation (specifically for delivery save replica).

Additionally, when I examined the function group of this IDoc FM, I found a wrapper Function Module (FM: /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA) for creating EWM Inbound Deliveries. This FM uses the same class and approach as the IDoc. After numerous experiments and setbacks, I successfully figured out how to make this Function Module work independently to create Inbound Deliveries in an EWM Decentralized system. This FM would only work if it is called externally, i.e., in an update task with qRFC. I'll be writing a blog post soon that explains the program and process in detail, as I believe many are seeking a similar solution.

entry.title: SAP document for SAP ECC to S4HANA(TM, EWM) Integration document
entry.content:
We have SAP ECC as ERP & we are using both TM & EWM in S/4HANA & we are looking for Integration steps document to transfer the master data, transaction data & complete the process using the steps

entry.title: Duplicate spool is getting generated in MIGO for Mtyp 311.
entry.content:
Hello Friends

When i am trying to do transfer posting in MIGO, movement type 311 for custom Output , duplicate spools are getting generated which is causing paper wastage.

Replication steps.Step 1. Run the tcode MIGO
Step 2. Choose A08 Transfer posting, R10 Other
Step 3. Enter material <XXXXXXXXXX>, Plant XXXX, Issuing Storage location XXXX, Destination storage location XXXX and Quantity 1.
Step 4. Click on Post.

Did debugging there is no code to generate duplicate spools.

And even choosing Individual slip while posting.

 

Regards

Naeeum
